description_long: This is a simple, rectangular wooden stool with a flat top surface and four straight, sturdy legs. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a natural and slightly textured appearance. The stool has no backrest or footrest, emphasizing its minimalist and functional design. The edges and corners are sharp and unadorned, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for sitting or for use as a small side table in urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or public plazas. The finish appears matte, with a hard and slightly rough tactile quality typical of unfinished or lightly finished wood.
description: A minimalist, rectangular wooden stool with visible wood grain and four straight legs, featuring a matte, slightly rough finish. The design is functional and unadorned, suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat top surface and two of the four straight legs, with visible wood grain and sharp edges.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, highlighting the rectangular top and the parallel alignment of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the same flat top and leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with clear visibility of the wood texture and leg structure.
